description: Phase A of sequential-operations: core implementation + E2E tests complete (tasks 1-10 done). Committing E2E tests (task 11). Remaining: E2E commit, full CI validation, final review. Phase 0 archived at context/completed/phase-0-spec-discovery.json. Phase B plan at context/phase-b-repo-in-sequence.json (blocked on Phase A).

key_spec_decisions.Q1: repo: sub-pipeline runs in isolation; sub-composite + deferred merges integrate at declaration position
key_spec_decisions.Q2: include reads from source FS independently; can re-add after exclude
key_spec_decisions.Q3: rename mappings chain within and across ops (behavior change for implementation)
key_spec_decisions.Q4: no new presence guarantee; declaration order controls presence
key_spec_decisions.Q5: explicit merge missing source = error; auto-merge = warn+skip (existing rules unchanged)
key_spec_decisions.Q6: Phase 4 becomes sequential pass; Phase 5 simplifies to combine-with-local
key_spec_decisions.Q7: sequential applies to self, source, and with: blocks; cross-repo DFS unchanged

session_notes.phase_a_scope_notes: Phase A only changes Phase 5 ordering (Q6 interleaving). Full spec model (Q1 repo-in-sequence, Q2 include-from-source-FS, Q3 rename chaining) requires Phase B.
